extraction.one_line_summary: ALMEIDA João attacked with 6km to go on Monte Bondone, THOMAS Geraint bridged at 4.5km and took pink, ROGLIČ losing 25 seconds.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma pace at 52kph first hour prevented early break formation, controlling through lakeside tunnels until group finally established.
UAE Emirates used VINE Jay as final pacer before ALMEIDA attacked at 6km, reversing traditional GC team sacrificial hierarchy.
THOMAS Geraint bridged solo at 4.5km instead of sitting on ALMEIDA, gambling pink jersey gap against ROGLIČ sufficiently large.
ROGLIČ Primož required KUSS Sepp support with 6km remaining despite only 22-second starting deficit, exposing surprising weakness on 5500m climbing day.

rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: First Grand Tour stage win while in white jersey, strong enough to attack uphill with 6km out against defending champion
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: At nearly 37 years old, bridged 4.5km solo attack and put 25 seconds into ROGLIČ, reversing trend of age-related decline
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: Required domestique KUSS at 6km to go on climb where he started only 22 seconds behind, losing half a minute mid-climb
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: Survived from early break to finish fifth on stage, moved to fifth overall at 3:03 despite not being protected GC rider
rider_signals.McCARTHY Jay: negative: Struggled badly on final climb despite stage having more elevation than any other this Giro, unexpected weakness exposed
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: Took maximum KOM points early and secured jersey with 20-point lead, showing calculated breakaway selection targeting classification
